<text color="FFFFFFFF">Carry out your next mission with the Crossmark Operative Pack, featuring:</>

DisclaimerText.SourceString: V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items like Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, Wraps and the latest season's Battle Pass! Gliders and Contrails may not be used in Save the World mode.

Name.SourceString: <text color="fb81ffFF">Nia</> <text color="FFFFFFFF">Challenges.</> <text color="FFFFFFFF">Earn up to 1,500 V-Bucks by completing </> <text color="fb81ffFF">Save the World </>  <text color="FFFFFFFF">daily quests.</> <text color="fb81ffFF">Challenges unlocked after having completed the "Homebase Stormshield Defense 3" mission in "Save the World" Campaign.</>
